title: Sqlitelogictest crash in MySQL query
poc: CREATE TABLE tab1 (col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER);
SELECT col0 + - - CAST ( NULL AS REAL ) - + col0 + + col1 FROM tab1 cor0 WHERE ( NULL ) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT col0 + - - CAST( NULL AS DECIMAL ) - + col1 FROM tab1 cor0 WHERE ( NULL ) IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Invalid NULL handling in complex SQL expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1 (col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 REAL, col3 DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO tab1 (col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, NULL, 2.5, NULL);
SELECT col0 + - - CAST(NULL AS REAL) + col1 FROM tab1 WHERE (NULL) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT col2 + COALESCE(col3, 0) FROM tab1 WHERE col1 IS NULL;
SELECT col0 + (SELECT MAX(col1) FROM tab1 WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL) FROM tab1;
